candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line and matches top-line sales/revenue concept exactly.
Not revenue; this is a cost line, so not appropriate for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Capital gains from sales of non-current assets
candidates.why: Non-operating gain, not core revenue.
Also a valid top-line revenue label and may be used in some years/presentations.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; later code can take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Direct cost line and best match for COGS.
Also a valid COGS label, but appears to duplicate the same concept.

variables.notes: Selected the most standard direct-cost label and avoided duplicate concept lines.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A component representing selling overhead.
Clear overhead component covering administrative expenses.
Can be an overhead bucket when explicit SG&A subtotal is absent.
Balance-sheet accrual, not an income-statement expense line for PROF input mapping.
Explicitly excluded for XSGA because D&A should not be included.

variables.notes: No explicit populated SG&A subtotal row is present, so selected best overhead components and excluded D&A-related rows and totals/balancing items.

candidates.why: Administrative overhead, not specific R&D.
Explicit R&D expense line; best match.
R&D-related amortization, but XRD should prefer the main R&D expense line rather than D&A components.

candidates.row_label: Write down of capitalized development charges
candidates.why: Impairment/write-down related to development assets, not the primary recurring R&D expense line.
Offset/other operating income, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental amortization, not the main R&D expense line.
Balance-sheet asset, not an income-statement R&D expense.

variables.notes: Using the explicit reported R&D expense line only.

candidates.why: Could include financing costs, but less precise than explicit interest-expense labels.
Most direct match to interest expense.
Valid fallback if the more specific interest-expense line is unavailable in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Too narrow/specific versus total interest expense, but acceptable as lower-priority fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental and narrow; lower-priority fallback only.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Provided as a priority list across changing labels; later code should take the first non-missing value per year.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet equity line. No separate parent/owners equity line is provided.
Duplicate casing variant of the same total equity concept.
Entire balance sheet total, not equity alone.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity line is available, so using total equity as a priority list. Per rule, MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Income-statement attribution line, not a balance-sheet minority-interest stock variable.
Correct balance-sheet concept, but left unused because BE uses Total equity and adding MIB would risk double counting.
Income-statement total attribution line, not the balance-sheet stock measure.

variables.notes: Set to empty because BE is mapped to total equity; this avoids double counting noncontrolling interests in BE + MIB.
